content: Hey, I'm looking for some new books to read. I've been so busy with work at the studio and volunteering at the animal shelter on weekends.
That sounds like a great way to spend your free time! What kind of books are you in the mood for?

I'm not sure, I've been listening to a lot of music lately and I think I'd like something that combines my love of music with a good story. I've been playing piano for years and I'm actually planning to perform at a charity event on April 15th.
That sounds like a great event! There are some excellent books about music and musicians out there. Have you considered 'Just Kids' by Patti Smith?

No, I haven't. I'll have to check it out. I've been meaning to get back into reading more, but it's hard to find the time. I've been training for a marathon and that's been taking up a lot of my time.
Wow, a marathon is a big undertaking! You must be very dedicated. Do you have a favorite book or author that you always come back to?
Yeah, I love Stephen King. I've read all of his books and I'm always excited to see what he comes out with next. I've even got a signed copy of 'The Shining' that I treasure.
That's amazing! A signed copy of 'The Shining' must be very valuable. Have you ever thought about writing your own book?
Ha! I don't think so, I don't think I'm a good enough writer. But I do love brewing my own beer and I've even thought about starting a small brewery someday.
That sounds like a great hobby! Home brewing can be very rewarding. Do you have a favorite type of beer that you like to brew?
Yeah, I love brewing IPAs. There's something about the combination of hops and malt that just works for me. I've even won a few local competitions with my recipes.
That's impressive! You must be very knowledgeable about beer. Have you ever thought about sharing your recipes with others?
Actually, I've been thinking about starting a blog to share my recipes and brewing tips. I've even registered the domain name 'frankiesbrews.com' and I'm planning to launch it on June 1st.
That's a great idea! A blog can be a wonderful way to share your passion with others. Do you have any plans for how you'll promote your blog?
Yeah, I've been thinking about using social media to promote my blog. I've already got a pretty big following on Instagram and I think I can use that to drive traffic to my blog.
That's a great idea! Social media can be very effective for promoting a blog. Do you have any other hobbies or interests that you enjoy in your free time?
Yeah, I love running and I've even completed a few marathons. I'm actually planning to run the Boston Marathon on April 17th.
Wow, that's amazing! The Boston Marathon is a prestigious event. You must be very proud of yourself for qualifying.
Yeah, I am. It's been a lot of hard work, but it's worth it in the end. I'm just hoping the weather cooperates on the day of the race.
Fingers crossed for you! I'm sure you'll do great. It was nice chatting with you, Frankie.
